creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: It would be nice to have some sort of custom keyword in ASCII Doc to refer to git hashes.  Specifically for the list of __FreeBSD_version values, but also in other places.  This would allow centralizing the decision of how many hex digits to abbreviate in the rendered text as well as the generation of the link in the rendered website.  I'm not sure if ASCII Doc keywords can except parameters (in this case which repository the hash belongs to), if not we might need separate 'srcgit', 'docgit', etc. keywords?
